task_completion.description: Document is set to Landscape orientation with Narrow margins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document page appears wider than it is tall (Landscape). The text begins very close to the edges of the page, indicating Narrow (0.5") margins.

task_completion.description: The shortcut list is formatted into 3 columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main body of the text (the shortcuts) is divided into three distinct vertical columns across the page.

task_completion.description: The title is centered at the top and spans across all columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'Office 2010 Essential Shortcuts' is located at the very top of the page, centered horizontally across the entire page width, and is not constrained within the first column.

task_completion.description: All content fits on exactly one page without drastic deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Word status bar at the bottom left shows 'Page 1 of 1'. The page is densely packed with a long list of shortcuts (at least 55 items/paragraphs), showing that font size or spacing was adjusted to fit the content rather than deleting it.
The title bar at the top of the Microsoft Word window displays 'reference_guide.docx', or a File Explorer/Save As window shows the file saved with this exact name in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Microsoft Word 2010 GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Microsoft Word 2010 ribbon, dialog boxes (like Page Setup or Columns), and active cursor selections, rather than terminal windows running scripts to modify the file.

integrity.description: Columns were created using Word's layout features, not faked with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text flows naturally from the bottom of one column to the top of the next, and the ruler (if visible) shows column markers, rather than jagged text aligned manually with spaces.

integrity.description: The original shortcut content was preserved and not replaced with dummy text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text visible in the document consists of actual Microsoft Word keyboard shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+C, Ctrl+V, etc.) matching the original document's theme.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final document must be named 'reference_guide.docx'. It must be exactly 1 page long, in Landscape orientation, and contain 3 columns. The document must retain at least 55 paragraphs of the original shortcuts to prove content was not simply deleted to fit on one page.
